title: grounding_rejection_report
description: Phase 1 (verbatim span grounding) diagnostic artifact. Written to `processed/meetings/<source_id>/diagnostics/` for every promotion-gated meeting_minutes run that had at least one rejection, AND for every run blocked by `grounding_rate_below_floor`. Lifecycle mirrors `debug__<run_id>.json`: never promoted, never indexed, never product. The correction miner reads these to surface hallucination patterns as their own failure category.

target_artifact_id.description: artifact_id of the meeting_minutes artifact this report explains.

target_artifact_type.description: artifact_type of the target — always `meeting_minutes` in Phase 1 but kept explicit so the writer can attach to other types in later phases without a schema bump.

source_id.description: Optional. meeting_id / source_id this run was for.

run_id.description: Optional. The governed-loop run that produced this report.

grounding_rate.description: len(accepted) / (len(accepted) + len(rejected)). 1.0 for a vacuous pass (no items).

artifact_blocked.description: True when the WHOLE target artifact was blocked (transcript_unreadable or grounding_rate_below_floor).

block_reason_code.description: Set only when artifact_blocked is true. One of: transcript_unreadable, grounding_rate_below_floor.

rejected_items.description: One entry per rejected item, with full audit detail. Each entry MUST carry the item, the reason_code, and (for verbatim items) the expected_quote_normalized / actual_at_offset_normalized / offset_checked triple so a reviewer can explain the rejection without reading the gate code.

item_type.description: Which payload key the item came from (e.g. `decisions`, `attendees`).

item.description: The original rejected item (may be an object, a list, or a bare value — bare values are themselves a grounding violation).

reason_code.description: One of the four documented rejection reasons.

expected_quote_normalized.description: For verbatim rejections: the normalized form of the source_quote the gate tried to match. Null for turn_aggregate / missing-field rejections.

actual_at_offset_normalized.description: For offset-mismatch rejections: the normalized substring that was actually present at the declared offset.

offset_checked.description: For verbatim rejections: the quote_offset_normalized that was checked. Null for turn_aggregate / missing-field rejections.
